2606.20969.title: AutoACSL: Synthesizing ACSL Specifications by Integrating LLMs with CPG-Based Static Analysis
2606.20969.paper_summary: Generating formal specifications for C programs remains a challenge in formal verification due to the manual effort, expertise, and semantic precision required. While recent advancements in large language models (LLMs) offer promise in automating specification synthesis, current approaches often lack semantic depth and produce unverifiable or incomplete contracts. To address these limitations, we introduce AutoACSL, a novel framework that integrates LLM prompting with semantic features extracted from Code Property Graphs (CPGs). AutoACSL performs static analyses to extract key semantic elements, including arithmetic operations, loop and recursion structures, and return value propagation, which are encoded into structured prompts. These prompts enable the LLM not only to generate normal behavioral specifications but also to include constraints that prevent inputs leading to runtime errors. AutoACSL employs a feedback-driven synthesis loop, where candidate specifications are verified using Frama-C/WP and refined iteratively until verification succeeds or a termination condition is met. Evaluated on 604 programs drawn from diverse datasets, AutoACSL achieves a 98% specification generation success ratio and a 96% full proof ratio when paired with Gemini-3. Compared to a code-only baseline, AutoACSL improves the full proof ratio by 24.7% to 51.7% across four LLMs (GPT-o4 Mini, GPT-5.2, Grok-4.1, and Gemini-3), demonstrating that integrating large language models with CPG-based static analysis substantially enhances both generation robustness and verification effectiveness for automated ACSL specification synthesis.
2606.20969.paper_summary_zh: 生成 C 程式的正式規範在形式驗證中仍然是一個挑戰，因為這需要手動努力、專業知識和語義精確性。雖然最近在大型語言模型（LLMs）方面的進展提供了自動化規範合成的希望，但當前的方法往往缺乏語義深度，並產生不可驗證或不完整的合約。為了解決這些限制，我們介紹了 AutoACSL，一個新穎的框架，將 LLM 提示與從代碼屬性圖（CPGs）中提取的語義特徵相結合。AutoACSL 執行靜態分析以提取關鍵語義元素，包括算術運算、迴圈和遞歸結構以及返回值傳播，這些元素被編碼為結構化提示。這些提示使 LLM 不僅能生成正常行為的規範，還能包含防止導致運行時錯誤的輸入的約束。AutoACSL 採用反饋驅動的合成迴圈，候選規範通過 Frama-C/WP 進行驗證，並迭代地進行精煉，直到驗證成功或滿足終止條件。根據來自多樣數據集的 604 程式進行評估，AutoACSL 在與 Gemini-3 配對時達到了 98% 的規範生成成功率和 96% 的完整證明率。與僅基於代碼的基準相比，AutoACSL 在四個 LLM（GPT-o4 Mini、GPT-5.2、Grok-4.1 和 Gemini-3）中將完整證明率提高了 24.7% 至 51.7%，顯示出將大型語言模型與基於 CPG 的靜態分析相結合，顯著增強了自動化 ACSL 規範合成的生成穩健性和驗證有效性。
2606.20969.author: Han Zhou et.al.
2606.20969.authors: Han Zhou, Yu Luo, Dianxiang Xu
